elements.title: Freddie Moore
elements.contents: ... that Freddie Moore (pictured) began playing drums at 12, but didn't record an album as leader until he was in his 80s?

elements.title: siege of Naples
elements.contents: ... that Totila's actions during the siege of Naples fitted his general strategy of winning by being kind?

elements.title: Taihi Kimura
elements.contents: ... that Taihi Kimura hosted the closing ceremony for a nationwide baseball tournament before starting a career in voice acting?

elements.title: All My Heroes Are Cornballs
elements.contents: ... that JPEGMafia once released a flash drive containing All My Heroes Are Cornballs that resembles a PlayStation 2 memory card?

elements.title: 1967 Salvadoran presidential election
elements.contents: ... that laws on compulsory voting were not enforced during the 1967 Salvadoran presidential election?

elements.title: Chaldean National Congress
elements.contents: ... that the failures of the Chaldean National Congress reflected the sectarian nature of Chaldean identity, according to its co-founder?

elements.title: Nining Suningsih Rochadiat
elements.contents: ... that Nining Suningsih Rochadiat's decision to join the diplomatic service was influenced by reading Little House on the Prairie?

elements.title: 2026 wildfires in Ōtsuchi
elements.contents: ... that the 2026 wildfires in Ōtsuchi are regarded as one of the worst mountain-wildfire disasters in Japan in decades?

elements.title: Lego Horizon Adventures
elements.contents: ... that every in-game environment and asset in Lego Horizon Adventures was constructed entirely from individual digital Lego bricks, meaning that they could theoretically be built in real life?
